description_long: This is a modern sports helmet, predominantly white with a smooth, hard shell and a robust faceguard structure. Both sides of the helmet feature a large, stylized red bird head graphic with bold lines and an aggressive expression, giving it a dynamic and sporty appearance. The helmet has multiple angular ventilation slits on the top and sides, designed for airflow and comfort during use. The faceguard is constructed from several thick bars, providing facial protection while allowing visibility and breathability. The interior is not visible, but such helmets typically contain foam padding for impact absorption and comfort. The overall design suggests it is intended for high-impact activities, such as American football, and is both functional and visually striking.
description: A white sports helmet with a red bird graphic on both sides, featuring a sturdy faceguard and multiple ventilation slits. The design is sleek, protective, and visually bold.
description_view_0: Front view showing the faceguard structure and the smooth, rounded forehead area with two top ventilation slits.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the large red bird graphic and the angular side vent, with the faceguard partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back curvature of the helmet and the continuation of the red graphic lines from both sides.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with the red bird graphic and side vent clearly visible, and the faceguard extending forward.
attribute_ventilation_pattern: Four angular vents: two on the top and one on each side, all elongated and positioned for airflow across the helmet.
attribute_graphic_design: Large, stylized red bird head graphic on both sides, with bold lines and an aggressive motif; otherwise solid white.
